title: Ten minute glow base for humid mornings
author: Lina Finds
raw_text: A simple makeup routine for humid mornings. Start with a light gel moisturizer, use SPF, then spot conceal only around redness. Products: gel moisturizer, mineral sunscreen, peach corrector, cushion foundation. Finish with a thin layer of powder only on the T-zone.
ocr_text: SPF, spot conceal, cushion, powder T-zone

title: Lip color map for muted rose makeup
author: Soft Palette Lab
raw_text: Comparison of muted rose lip colors by undertone. Cool rose looks cleaner with gray knitwear, warmer rose works better with beige trench coats. Items: satin tint, matte pencil, clear gloss. Useful swatches are shown in window light.
ocr_text: cool rose, warm rose, satin tint, matte pencil

title: Five piece office capsule for summer rain
author: Desk to Dinner
raw_text: Capsule outfit formula for rainy office days. Items: cropped trench, black knit tank, straight ankle pants, waterproof flats, structured tote. The palette stays black, white, olive, and silver so every piece rotates without looking repetitive.

title: Linen shirt styling without looking crumpled
author: Quiet Closet
raw_text: The trick is choosing medium weight linen and pairing it with sharper textures. Key point one: roll sleeves twice and keep the collar open. Key point two: wear a smooth belt and structured shoes. Key point three: steam only the front placket and cuffs.
ocr_text: linen shirt, structured shoes, smooth belt

title: Desk mobility routine after long focus blocks
author: Move Minutes
raw_text: A six minute mobility sequence for shoulders and hips after sitting. Step 1: neck circles for thirty seconds. Step 2: doorway chest opener for one minute. Step 3: seated figure-four stretch. Step 4: hip flexor lunge with gentle breathing.

title: Beginner strength plan with two dumbbells
author: Small Space Strength
raw_text: Three day workout rotation for small apartments. Day one is goblet squat, row, dead bug. Day two is Romanian deadlift, floor press, side plank. Day three is reverse lunge, shoulder press, suitcase carry. Keep two reps in reserve.

title: Meeting notes template that turns into tasks
author: Operator Notes
raw_text: A work meeting template with sections for decision, owner, deadline, open question, and follow-up message. The author uses it in Notion and copies the action rows into a weekly task list after each meeting.

title: Focus calendar for mixed research and admin days
author: Calendar Clinic
raw_text: The workflow groups research blocks before lunch and admin blocks after lunch. Email gets two scheduled windows. The rule is no calendar block under twenty five minutes unless it is a phone call or commute buffer.

title: Language study loop with shadowing and Anki
author: Twenty Minute Study
raw_text: A study loop for language listening. Step 1: listen once without subtitles. Step 2: shadow two sentences. Step 3: save only three phrases into Anki. Step 4: record a one minute recap using the new phrases.

title: Paper reading notes for dense methods sections
author: Method Desk
raw_text: The reading checklist separates claim, dataset, method, assumption, metric, and limitation. The post recommends writing one plain-English sentence per figure before reading the caption deeply.

title: Sunday reset routine for a small apartment
author: Tiny Home Reset
raw_text: A home routine that uses three baskets: laundry, returns, and paperwork. Start by clearing surfaces, then run laundry, then reset the desk. The routine avoids deep cleaning and focuses on making Monday morning calmer.
ocr_text: three baskets, desk reset, Monday calm

title: No spend month budget board
author: Gentle Budget
raw_text: A visual budget board for a no spend month. The columns are needs, planned treats, free activities, repair before buying, and wishlist parking lot. The post suggests reviewing the board every Friday evening.
ocr_text: needs, planned treats, wishlist parking lot
